root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.membership_no, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_qty_old, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_qty_new, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.period, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.effactive_date, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.remark, sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.period_compomise, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.salary_amount, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_mem_m_share_mem.period_recrieve, sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date, sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_date, sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_status,
case sc_mem_m_chang_request.cancel_status when '1' then 'ยกเลิก' else (case sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_status when '1' then 'อนุมัติ' when '2' then 'ยังไม่อนุมัติ' end)end as status
FROM sc_mem_m_chg_share_det, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_chang_request
WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no ) and sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status = '2' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no ASC
